result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate documentation files from Bicep models having the [ResourceType] attribute and additional custom attributes from Bicep.LocalDeploy project.

Usage:
  bicep-local-docgen [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <directoryOrFile>  Generate documentation files from Bicep models.
  check <directoryOrFile>     Check if models have the required documentation attributes.

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate documentation files from Bicep models having the [ResourceType] attribute and additional custom attributes from Bicep.LocalDeploy project.

Usage:
  bicep-local-docgen [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <directoryOrFile>  Generate documentation files from Bicep models.
  check <directoryOrFile>     Check if models have the required documentation attributes.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Check if models have the required documentation attributes.

Usage:
  bicep-local-docgen check [<directoryOrFile>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <directoryOrFile>  One or more paths to directories containing files to check or specific files to check. If omitted, uses current directory.

Options:
  --ignore-path <ignore-path>                                        Path to the bicep-local-docgen ignore file (.biceplocalgenignore)
  --log-level <Critical|Debug|Error|Information|None|Trace|Warning>  Specify the log level - Critical, Debug, Error, Information (default), None, Trace, Warning [default: Information]
  --include-extended                                                 Include validation for BicepFrontMatter and BicepDocCustom attributes
  -v, --verbose                                                      Enable verbose logging.
  -?, -h, --help                                                     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Check if models have the required documentation attributes.

Usage:
  bicep-local-docgen check [<directoryOrFile>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <directoryOrFile>  One or more paths to directories containing files to check or specific files to check. If omitted, uses current directory.

Options:
  --ignore-path <ignore-path>                                        Path to the bicep-local-docgen ignore file (.biceplocalgenignore)
  --log-level <Critical|Debug|Error|Information|None|Trace|Warning>  Specify the log level - Critical, Debug, Error, Information (default), None, Trace, Warning [default: Information]
  --include-extended                                                 Include validation for BicepFrontMatter and BicepDocCustom attributes
  -v, --verbose                                                      Enable verbose logging.
  -?, -h, --help                                                     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate documentation files from Bicep models.

Usage:
  bicep-local-docgen generate [<directoryOrFile>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <directoryOrFile>  One or more paths to directories containing files to process or specific files to process. If omitted, uses current directory.

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                                              The output directory to store generated docs. [default: docs]
  --ignore-path <ignore-path>                                        Path to the bicep-local-docgen ignore file (.biceplocalgenignore)
  --log-level <Critical|Debug|Error|Information|None|Trace|Warning>  Specify the log level - Critical, Debug, Error, Information (default), None, Trace, Warning [default: Information]
  -v, --verbose                                                      Enable verbosity logging.
  -f, --force                                                        Overwrite existing files if they already exist.
  -?, -h, --help                                                     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate documentation files from Bicep models.

Usage:
  bicep-local-docgen generate [<directoryOrFile>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <directoryOrFile>  One or more paths to directories containing files to process or specific files to process. If omitted, uses current directory.

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                                              The output directory to store generated docs. [default: docs]
  --ignore-path <ignore-path>                                        Path to the bicep-local-docgen ignore file (.biceplocalgenignore)
  --log-level <Critical|Debug|Error|Information|None|Trace|Warning>  Specify the log level - Critical, Debug, Error, Information (default), None, Trace, Warning [default: Information]
  -v, --verbose                                                      Enable verbosity logging.
  -f, --force                                                        Overwrite existing files if they already exist.
  -?, -h, --help                                                     Show help and usage information
